entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: An important annual oilseed legume crop valued as a rich source of proteins, minerals and vitamins

entities.name: CALCAREOUS SOIL
entities.description: Soil type under which groundnut genetic divergence was analyzed in northern Karnataka

entities.name: NORTHERN KARNATAKA
entities.description: Region where the study was conducted

entities.name: VIJAYAPURA
entities.description: Location of the college of agriculture where the experiment was conducted

entities.name: YIELD
entities.description: The productivity of the groundnut crop

entities.name: IDC RESISTANCE
entities.description: Resistance to IDC, a trait studied for genetic diversity

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variability of genetic characteristics among groundnut genotypes

entities.name: GCV
entities.description: Genotypic Coefficient of Variation used to estimate variability

entities.name: PCV
entities.description: Phenotypic Coefficient of Variation used to estimate variability

entities.name: HERITABILITY
entities.description: The proportion of phenotypic variation that is due to genetic factors

entities.name: GA AS % MEAN
entities.description: Genetic Advance as percentage of mean used to evaluate trait improvement

entities.name: HYBRIDIZATION
entities.description: A breeding method used to obtain high heterotic response and improve IDC resistance

entities.name: SELECTION
entities.description: A breeding method used to improve groundnut genotypes for IDC resistance

entities.name: NET PLOT YIELD
entities.description: A specific component of yield measured in the experiment

entities.name: INTRA-CLUSTER DISTANCE
entities.description: A measure used to assess diversity within clusters of genotypes

entities.name: INTER-CLUSTER DISTANCE
entities.description: A measure used to assess diversity between clusters of genotypes

entities.name: HETEROTIC RESPONSE
entities.description: The superior performance of hybrids compared to their parents
